fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code of the resource.

fields.name: Location Name
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the location.
The program fills in this field automatically when the Location Code field is filled in. The program uses the information from the Location table.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource in the location.

fields.name: Resource Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the resource.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the resource becomes available in this location.
